findings.signature: db = new Database(dbPath) — synchronous constructor, line 319; read-only variant at line 379
findings.notes: better-sqlite3 synchronous constructor; libSQL client is async — every call site must become await-aware or use a sync wrapper

findings.signature: db.pragma('busy_timeout = 5000'); db.pragma('journal_mode = WAL'); db.pragma('foreign_keys = ON'); db.pragma('journal_mode = DELETE'); db.pragma('wal_checkpoint(FULL)')
findings.notes: Five .pragma() call sites; Turso/libSQL has no .pragma() API — must migrate to SET PRAGMA SQL or connection-string options

findings.signature: db.pragma('journal_mode = WAL') with fallback to DELETE
findings.notes: WAL mode with isWalFallbackError() fallback logic; Turso handles journaling differently — this branching logic becomes dead code

findings.signature: database.prepare('PRAGMA table_info(skill_nodes)').all()
findings.notes: PRAGMA table_info used for schema introspection in ensureSchemaMigrations; must use libSQL information_schema or equivalent

findings.signature: database.pragma('wal_checkpoint(FULL)')
findings.notes: WAL checkpoint not applicable to Turso's replication model — becomes no-op or error

findings.signature: database.exec(SCHEMA_SQL) — multi-statement DDL execution
findings.notes: better-sqlite3 .exec() runs multiple statements in one call; libSQL may require batch() or sequential execute()

findings.signature: const tx = database.transaction(() => { ... }); tx()
findings.notes: better-sqlite3 synchronous .transaction() wrapper; Turso/libSQL transaction API is async and structurally different

findings.signature: ensureVecTableForDim(database, 768); ensureVecTableForDim(database, 1024)
findings.notes: sqlite-vec virtual table creation (vec0); Turso/libSQL has no vector index support — must replace with external vector store or BLOB+brute-force

findings.signature: new Database(databasePath, { readonly: true, fileMustExist: true })
findings.notes: better-sqlite3 constructor options; libSQL open() takes different option shape — must map readonly/fileMustExist

findings.signature: Buffer.from(array.buffer, array.byteOffset, array.byteLength) — embedding BLOB encoding
findings.notes: Node Buffer for BLOB storage; libSQL may return Uint8Array — encoding/decoding path needs verification

findings.signature: database.prepare('SELECT ...').get(id) / .all(id) — prepared statement caching via WeakMap
findings.notes: better-sqlite3 synchronous .prepare()/.get()/.all(); libSQL prepare() is async and returns different statement objects

findings.signature: WeakMap<Database.Database, PreparedStatements> — synchronous statement cache
findings.notes: WeakMap keyed on better-sqlite3 Database instance; libSQL connection type differs, cache strategy needs rework

findings.signature: new Database(dbPath) / new Database(dbPath, { readonly: true, fileMustExist: true })
findings.notes: Separate lease DB with its own Database instances; each open/close cycle must become async under libSQL

findings.signature: db.pragma('busy_timeout = 1000')
findings.notes: Lease DB busy_timeout via .pragma(); critical for single-writer lease protocol — must migrate to PRAGMA SQL statement

findings.signature: db.exec('PRAGMA journal_mode = WAL') inside ensureSchema
findings.notes: Lease DB sets WAL via .exec() raw SQL; WAL semantics differ in Turso embedded replicas — lease contention model may break

findings.signature: db.transaction((): LeaseAcquireResult => { ... }) — atomic lease acquire
findings.notes: Synchronous transaction wrapping lease acquire/reserve logic; must become async — heartbeat loop timing affected

findings.signature: result.changes === 0 — RunResult.changes for optimistic concurrency check
findings.notes: better-sqlite3 RunResult.changes; libSQL execute() returns different result shape — changes field needs mapping

findings.signature: new Database(dbPath) — synchronous open per mutation call
findings.notes: Per-call synchronous Database open/close; runDaemonStateMutation retry loop must become fully async

findings.signature: new Database(dbPath, { readonly: true, fileMustExist: true })
findings.notes: Read-only probe open; same constructor-options mapping needed as other new Database sites

findings.signature: db.prepare('PRAGMA quick_check').get()
findings.notes: PRAGMA quick_check for corruption detection; Turso/libSQL embedded mode may not support quick_check — integrity model differs
